jobDescription: Who we are At Justworks, you’ll enjoy a welcoming and casual environment, great benefits, wellness program offerings, company retreats, and the ability to interact with and learn from leaders in the startup community. We work hard and care about our most prized asset - our people. We’re helping businesses get off the ground by enabling them to focus on running their business. We solve HR issues. We’re data driven and never stop iterating. If you’d like to work in a supportive, entrepreneurial environment, are interested in building something meaningful and having fun while doing it, we’d love to hear from you. What you’ll do The IT Contractor will provide integral support to the IT Team and business by excelling at a white-glove approach to front line IT support (think general troubleshooting, application administration, employee onboarding/exits) to help enable our teams to continue innovating and moving toward their goals. You will learn to own primary triage for all IT requests, working with the team to escalate requests to the right person, communicate expectations to requesters and stakeholders, and become an integral part of delivering IT projects.  Experience with Jira, Slack, Jamf, & GSuite are a plus, but not required. This position will report to the IT Manager, who will make sure you have the proper foundation in place (communication cadence, institutional knowledge, compliance guardrails) to be successful in this role. We are looking for a commitment of 40 hours/week for 6 months, with potential to continue on in a similar capacity.  The best candidates will have at least 1-2 years of experience in a corporate IT environment.
